fields.title: Autoresearch: capture child session file via ctx.newSession setup instead of stale command context
fields.description: Autoresearch still reads ctx.sessionManager after ctx.switchSession/ctx.newSession inside the same command flow. In interactive pi the command context can keep the pre-transition sessionManager, so ensureAutoresearchChildSession can validate/attach the wrong session just like Ralph did before the newSession-setup fix. Mirror the Ralph fix by tracking the current session file explicitly and capturing the child session file from ctx.newSession({ setup }). Add a regression test that leaves the command context on the controller session while setup reports the real child session.
